meta.source: Extracted from retool.com master.css — transitions, animations, @keyframes, easing curves

easings.description: Retool defines 4 primary easing curves as CSS custom properties — all on :root

ease-in.usage: Elements leaving the screen — exits, collapses

ease-in-out.usage: Transitions between states — tab switches, category changes

ease-in-out-back.usage: Playful spring-like entries — tooltips, toasts, micro-animations

ease-out.usage: Elements entering the screen — hero animations, content reveal

durations.description: Extracted from .duration-* Tailwind utilities in master.css

transitionProperties.description: Custom transition-property shorthand classes extracted from master.css
transitionProperties.transition: color, background-color, border-color, text-decoration-color, fill, stroke, opacity, box-shadow, transform, filter, backdrop-filter
transitionProperties.transition-colors: color, background-color, border-color, text-decoration-color, fill, stroke
transitionProperties.transition-transform-opacity-color: transform, opacity, color, background-color, border-color, text-decoration-color, fill, stroke

red-pulse.definition: @keyframes red-pulse { 0% { background-color: var(--raw-semantic-critical-10); } to { background-color: var(--raw-semantic-critical-8); } }
red-pulse.usage: .red-pulse — 2s linear infinite alternate — critical alert indicator

button-hover.usage: Standard primary button hover — background color shift + very slight scale

slide-up-enter.css: transition: transform 400ms var(--dvt-ease-out), opacity 400ms var(--dvt-ease-out); from: { transform: translateY(16px); opacity: 0; }
slide-up-enter.usage: Content sections entering on scroll, modal sheets sliding in

tab-switch.usage: Tab indicator sliding between active tabs

nav-backdrop.usage: Navigation bar becoming opaque on scroll

willChange.transform: Applied to animated elements before animation starts for GPU layer promotion
